task: Fix compaction failure for Bedrock Qwen3 Coder 480B by adding modify_params: true to litellm_settings in litellm_config.yaml and optionally extending dummy-tool injection to Bedrock providers in opencode request.ts.

key_reasoning.reason: Two files touched: litellm_config.yaml (1-line addition to litellm_settings) and optionally opencode packages/opencode/src/session/llm/request.ts (~10 lines mirroring the existing GitHub Copilot dummy-tool pattern). No new components, no architectural boundaries crossed.
Primary fix is Config/Infrastructure layer only. Secondary fix adds the LLM-request-preparation layer within opencode. At most two layers, both with established patterns already present.

modify_params: true is global across all Bedrock Converse calls through the LiteLLM proxy, but the flag only activates under the specific corner case of tool-call blocks in history without a tools parameter — a condition that should not arise outside compaction. Exact precedent exists: drop_params: true is already set in the same litellm_settings block; GitHub Copilot dummy-tool injection is already in request.ts. Rollback is trivial (revert 1 line or 10-line block).
